creator: Hunter Micheletto
source_text:
🔥These Air Fried Crispy Chipotle Honey Chicken Tenders Are Insanely Good

🛒 WHAT YOU NEED 

🍗 Chicken
• 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken tenderloins
• Salt & pepper to taste
• 1 tsp garlic powder

🥣 Breading
• 1/4 cup @fit.flour (code: shredz) (or all-purpose flour)
• 2 large eggs
• 2 cups crushed cornflakes
• Cooking spray

🌶️ Chipotle Honey Glaze
• 1/4 cup honey
• 4-6 chipotle peppers in adobo, finely chopped
• 1 tbsp adobo sauce
• 2 garlic cloves, minced
• 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar
• Hit sauce if you desire 
• 1/4 cup of broth to stretch it out 

High Protein Ranch
• 1 cup nonfat Greek yogurt
• 2 tbsp light mayo
• 1 tbsp ranch seasoning
• 1 tbsp fresh dill, chopped
• Splash of pickle juice
• Splash of water to thin

📊 Macros Per Serving (about 3 tenders w/ ranch ) 
406 Calories
49g Protein
38g Carbs
6g Fat

#highprotein #lowcalorie #recipe #easytomake #highproteinmeals

raw_ingredients: 4-6 chipotle peppers in adobo, finely chopped

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The description provides ingredients and macros but no preparation instructions, so this is intentionally an incomplete fallback case.
Accepted after general leading-symbol normalization and demonstrative-subject title extraction; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
